content_body:
Penland's Apple House, located in Ellijay, GA, is a beloved destination for fresh, locally grown apples and a variety of delicious homemade treats.

Family-owned and operated since the 1930s, Penland's offers an extensive selection of apple varieties, as well as cider, apple butter, and other seasonal produce. Visitors can explore the charming market, which also features local jams, jellies, baked goods, and unique gifts.

With its friendly atmosphere and commitment to quality, Penland's Apple House is the perfect place to experience the best of North Georgia's apple country and bring home a taste of the region's agricultural heritage.
title: Penland's Apple House
